scenarios.description: clone() on an empty Document creates a new Document instance with same baseUri and independent OutputSettings and Parser
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("http://example.com"); // empty document
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is not the same instance as original; returned.baseUri() equals "http://example.com"; returned.outputSettings() is a distinct object equal in all fields; returned.parser() is a distinct object equal to original.parser()

scenarios.description: clone() preserves custom OutputSettings modifications in the clone without linking to original
scenarios.expectedResult: clone.outputSettings().prettyPrint() is false; clone.outputSettings().indentAmount() is 5; and modifications to clone.outputSettings() do not affect doc.outputSettings()

scenarios.description: clone() preserves custom Parser settings in the clone without linking to original
scenarios.precondition: Parser p = Parser.xmlParser().setTrackErrors(10); Document doc = new Document("http://b"); doc.parser(p);
scenarios.expectedResult: clone.parser().getTrackErrors() equals 10; changing clone.parser().setTrackErrors(0) does not affect doc.parser().getTrackErrors() which remains 10

scenarios.description: clone() duplicates child nodes so modifications to clone children do not affect original children
scenarios.expectedResult: clone.body().select("p").text() equals ["hello"]; removing clone.body().child(0) does not remove original body child

scenarios.description: clone() copies quirksMode value from original and remains independent on change
scenarios.expectedResult: clone.quirksMode() equals limitedQuirks; setting clone.quirksMode(quirks) does not change doc.quirksMode()

scenarios.description: clone() duplicates connection session so original connection remains unaffected when modifying clone only
scenarios.precondition: Connection c = Jsoup.connect("http://c"); Document doc = new Document("c").connection(c);
scenarios.expectedResult: clone.connection() returns a Connection equal in settings to original; modifying clone.connection().timeout(1000) does not affect original connection timeout
